name: Spiced Melon Cocktail
recipeIngredient: 1 Ripe honeydew melon, cut in half and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop melon into balls.
2. To make dressing, whip cream until soft peaks form. Mix in mayonnaise, lemon juice, paprika, hot pepper sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and tomato paste.
3. Stir crabmeat into dressing. Lightly mix in melon and toss ingredients gently until coated. Arrange shredded radicchio leaves on top (optional).
